hypothesis: Integrating a synthesizability-ranking tool trained on experimental synthesis records into MatAgent’s Planning stage will increase the fraction of proposed compositions that simultaneously lie within ±0.25 eV/atom of the target formation energy and have a synthesizability score ≥0.7, while reducing the average number of DFT relaxation attempts required to obtain an experimentally synthesizable structure by at least 40% relative to MatAgent without the synthesizability tool.
